Open Settings, enable Vibrate notifications in AnkiDroid general settings, then return to Settings and check the Gestures options.
In Settings, review the sync options under AnkiDroid, then navigate back and adjust the font size in Appearance.
Go to AnkiDroid settings to check my account status, then return to the Settings menu and explore the Reviewing options.
Open the Advanced settings to check experimental features, then go back to Settings and enable Night mode in Appearance.
Check the error reporting mode in AnkiDroid settings, then return to the previous menu and configure Gestures.
